title: AN ACT DECLARING MAY 27 OF EVERY YEAR AS A SPECIAL WORKING PUBLIC HOLIDAY IN THE PROVINCE OF CAMARINES SUR AND IN THE CITIES OF NAGA AND IRIGA IN COMMEMORATION OF ITS ANNUAL FOUNDATION ANNIVERSARY

chunks.text:
H. No. 7754 / 97 OG No. 22, 3227 (May 28, 2001)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9031, March 05, 2001 ]

AN ACT DECLARING MAY 27 OF EVERY YEAR AS A SPECIAL WORKING PUBLIC HOLIDAY IN THE PROVINCE OF CAMARINES SUR AND IN THE CITIES OF NAGA AND IRIGA IN COMMEMORATION OF ITS ANNUAL FOUNDATION ANNIVERSARY

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. May 27 of every year is hereby declared as a Special Working Public Holiday in the entire Province of Camarines Sur including the cities of Naga and Iriga in commemoration of its foundation anniversary as a political unit.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.) AQUILINO Q. PIMENTEL

JR.

(Sgd.) FELICIANO BELMONTE

JR.

President of the

Senate

Speaker of the House of

Representatives

This

Act

which

is

a

consolidation of House Bill No. 9885 and Senate Bill No. 2255 was

finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate

on February 8, 2001.

(Sgd.) LUTGARDO B.

BARBO

(Sgd.) ROBERTO P.

NAZARENO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General House of

Representatives

Approved:

March 5, 2001

(Sgd.) GLORIA

MACAPAGAL-ARROYO

President of the Philippines
